use_cases: Website footer for SaaS and product landing pages
Multi-section footer with brand branding and link navigation
Dark/light mode responsive footer with scroll-triggered animations
Corporate footer with company branding and social links
ai_summary: A responsive website footer component featuring brand logo with dark/light mode support, tagline description, and grid-based link sections. Built with Framer Motion for smooth scroll-triggered entrance animations with configurable delays and spring physics. Uses Tailwind CSS for muted color theming and responsive layout with xl-grid columns. Designed for modern SaaS and developer tool websites seeking a clean, professional footer structure.
